legacyOptions.expr:
changes(
sum by (instance) (
    group by (instance,release) (node_uname_info{job=~"integrations/(node_exporter|unix)",cluster=~"$cluster",job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"})
    )
[$__interval:1m] offset -$__interval) > 1

spec.title: Disk I/O
spec.description: The number of I/O requests per second for the device/volume.

spec.title: Disk average wait time
spec.description:
The average time for requests issued to the device to be served.
This includes the time spent by the requests in queue and the time spent servicing them.'

spec.title: Filesystem space availabe
spec.description: Filesystem space utilisation in bytes, by mountpoint.

spec.title: Disk space usage
spec.description: Disk utilisation in percent, by mountpoint. Some duplication can occur if the same filesystem is mounted in multiple locations.

spec.title: Free inodes
spec.description: The inode is a data structure in a Unix-style file system that describes a file-system object such as a file or a directory.

spec.title: Total inodes
spec.description: The inode is a data structure in a Unix-style file system that describes a file-system object such as a file or a directory.

spec.title: File descriptors
spec.description:
File descriptor is a handle to an open file or input/output (I/O) resource, such as a network socket or a pipe.
The operating system uses file descriptors to keep track of open files and I/O resources, and provides a way for programs to read from and write to them.

spec.title: Disk reads/writes
spec.description: Disk read/writes in bytes per second.
